How to Get the Most ROI (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 1 of 2
Ry Schwartz: Hey, guys. Welcome back to this final lesson within the Welcome Module. I
really just wanted to record this final piece. You know, you're sitting here, you
just invested, you have this program on your lap, and you're probably ready to
go, but I think it's important to just take a few minutes and talk about how you
can get the most ROI out of it because that's kind of really what it's all about.
The first thing I really want to touch upon is that this isn't so much a course as it
is an implementation program. So, therefore it's really going to be best if you're
using it with a product, with a project, sorry, or a launch or funnel that you
already have in mind. You know, maybe it's an evergreen funnel you already
have going that you can optimize. This really isn't meant to be a theoretical
dump. It's meant to arm you with the tools to put into immediate profitable
action for either yourself or a client.
If you are using this program to build upon or improve or optimize any of your
existing launch funnels, then you're fully invited to just dive into whatever
section will serve you most right now. So in some cases, just going through
module seven and adding a powerful closing email from our themeplate pack
will be enough to give you a huge instant win. From there you can track back to
modules one and two and really dive deeper into some of the underlying
principles that are fueling that success.
But whatever you do, the goal really is to 10X your investment, you know, to
10X your investment with a few hits of the send button. So we're not looking to
10X your investment in a year from now. We're looking to get that immediate
crunchy win if it's available, and then over the lifetime of you using this, over
everything you use this course for, every new product launch, every new client
you take on, really to magnify that more and more over time.
But if you are starting from scratch and really using this program to build out
your first minimum viable email funnel, then you will probably want to go
section through section to make sure you're building a cohesive synergistic
narrative from subsequence to subsequence and that you're really not missing
any key steps in coaching that conversions. So that's how it's really going to
round out and work.
Modules three through seven are really going to be where we break down each
subsequence. We're really going to do a deep dive video that talks about what
its job is in the overall conversion and how to execute it, how to actually coach
those behaviors and attitudes and shifts in a simple and powerful way. From
there, you're going to actually be going into your workbooks where we have a
set of key guiding questions that will help really draw out and extract the
messaging needed for that particular section. And then finally, you're going to
be invited to write the emails. You know, that whole execution thing and you
could either do this on your own, if you're feeling confident to do so, you know,
making sure you really hit those beats that we talked about in the main lesson,

or to speed things ups, you can choose from one of our proven email
themeplates that I'm going to be walking you through.
That's one way to approach it. If you actually have access to Six Figure Emails,
I'm going to point to you in reference throughout where there are even
additional themeplates you might want to take a look at and consider. Really,
the way we're going to approach this is, you know, from a place of not this
notion, this vague notion of overarching global mastery, but outcome-based
mastery. You know, it's important to remember right now that this program
isn't about making you the best copywriter in the world. You know. Let that sink
in. So many entrepreneurs, experts, and course creators struggle because when
they start to write copy or learn how to write copy, they're trying to gain
complete mastery. You know. So they're reading the classics, they're writing out
old sales letters by hand, and all of it does have its place. The only problem is it's
kind of out of align with what your ultimate goal is, you know, which is to get
more sales and create more impact out of your program, your funnel, your
launch.
All those other methods are great and it's not knocking mastery at all, but it's
really about getting the most bang for your buck, getting kind of the most value
out of your time, getting the most return out of your effort. To do that, we
really need to integrate learning about copy within the realm of launches and
building these funnels, not as a distant siloed off activity, but something that is
actually extremely relevant to what you are trying to do right now. Because that
is the biggest challenge I hear all the time is, you know, well-meaning
entrepreneurs and course creators will learn copy off in the distance, you know,
doing all these old-school methods. And then they'll try to drag it over, you
know, drag it over to the funnel they're trying to build and it just doesn't
translate so seamlessly. So that is what this is going to be about. It's about
outcome-based mastery. It's giving you the tools, the copywriting tools, the
skills, the email, the email themeplates, all needed to do one thing and one
thing only, which is to execute your launches and your funnels with more
confidence and more revenue.
That is it. That is all I have for the welcome module. One last final welcome into
